gaps.detail: PAHO dengue dashboard page and iframe URLs are mapped, but embedded Tableau/PHIP cells need a stable unauthenticated CSV/JSON endpoint before Ask Insects can claim country-level dashboard records.

payload.aedes_relevance: Dengue public-health surveillance relevant to Aedes aegypti vector intelligence

provenance.license: PAHO/EIH Open Data Core Indicators; source page terms and CC BY-NC 3.0 IGO apply unless otherwise indicated

records.text: PAHO/EIH Core Indicators annual dengue cases for Brazil (BRA) in 2025: 6010000 cases. This is a stable machine-readable PAHO Open Data CSV row, not a dashboard screenshot. Aedes aegypti relevance: dengue public-health surveillance is indexed as Aedes-relevant vector intelligence.
records.title: PAHO Core Indicators dengue cases: Brazil 2025

payload.aedes_relevance: Dengue dashboard surface relevant to Aedes aegypti vector public-health intelligence

provenance.license: PAHO/WHO public health surveillance page; source page terms apply

records.text: Official PAHO dengue dashboard locator for Aedes-relevant public-health surveillance. Dashboard page: https://example.org/dashboard. Embedded iframe URLs: https://phip.paho.org/trusted/example/views/1001en/Numeralia. This record makes the official dashboard surface queryable, but it is not a country-week PAHO/PLISA cell row because no stable unauthenticated CSV, JSON, or API endpoint has been proven.
records.title: PAHO dengue dashboard locator: PAHO dengue dashboard

records.text: PAHO dengue surveillance week summary for the Region of the Americas. Epidemiological week 50, 2024. Metrics: suspected cases: 62707, confirmed cases: 23034, confirmed percent: 36.7, severe cases: 219, deaths: 125, case fatality percent: 0.199, reporting countries: 32. Aedes aegypti relevance: dengue is indexed as Aedes-relevant public-health surveillance, not as mosquito abundance.
records.title: PAHO dengue surveillance week summary week 50, 2024

records.text: PAHO dengue surveillance year to date summary for the Region of the Americas. Epidemiological week 50, 2024. Metrics: suspected cases: 12970602, confirmed cases: 6963431, confirmed percent: 53.7, severe cases: 22842, deaths: 8340, case fatality percent: 0.064, reporting countries: 49, cumulative incidence per 100k: 1286.22, increase vs prior year percent: 190.0, increase vs five year average percent: 366.0. Aedes aegypti relevance: dengue is indexed as Aedes-relevant public-health surveillance, not as mosquito abundance.
records.title: PAHO dengue surveillance year to date summary week 50, 2024

records.text: PAHO dengue surveillance reports DENV-1, DENV-2, DENV-3, and DENV-4 in the Region of the Americas. Countries or territories reporting simultaneous circulation of all four serotypes: Brasil, Colombia, Costa Rica, El Salvador. Aedes aegypti relevance: dengue serotype circulation is indexed as Aedes-relevant public-health surveillance.
records.title: PAHO dengue serotype surveillance week 50, 2024
